features.name: Referral guide
features.description: Provides a concise introductory guide that explains the fundamentals of referral partnerships, including how to structure an agreement and approach a partner. The guide is accessible from the education section of the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Given a founder accesses the education section, when they view the referral guide, then they see an overview of referral steps.
Given the guide is read, when the founder completes a self-assessment, then they receive a personalised next-step recommendation.
features.user_story: As a founder, I want an introductory referral guide so that I understand how to structure a referral partnership.
features.business_value: Equips founders with the knowledge to execute referrals effectively, increasing the likelihood that introductions convert, supporting the >50% introduction response metric.
features.dependency_rationale: Guide assumes data from the intake questionnaire.

open_questions.question: Is a basic referral guide sufficient for MVP or is a full tutorial suite required?
open_questions.reason: The epic is 'must', but MVP may only need minimal education; need to confirm the depth of content to deliver in MVP.

features.name: Referral templates
features.description: Offers ready‑made referral agreement templates and short tutorial videos that founders can customise and share with potential partners. Templates streamline the creation of partnership documents.
acceptance_criteria: Given a founder wants to draft a referral agreement, when they select a template, then a pre‑filled document is generated.
Given a template is generated, when the founder shares it with a partner, then the partner can accept or suggest edits.
features.user_story: As a founder, I want referral templates so that I can quickly create partnership agreements.
features.business_value: Reduces friction in establishing referral agreements, helping to increase conversion of introductions and supporting the success metric of >50% introduction response.
features.dependency_rationale: Templates build on the concepts introduced in the referral guide.
